deliverables.7_reflection: Building this AI workflow taught me that real scraped data changes everything. When I integrated actual Apify Google Maps data, the ranking shifted — Krua Jiang Mai (4.8 stars, 2723 reviews) emerged as the clear winner, displacing our initial simulated top pick. The biggest challenge was normalizing price strings across different formats, requiring a robust parser before scoring was meaningful. The locked scoring weights forced disciplined thinking and prevented bias toward personal preferences. The n8n automation ran successfully in 1.295s connecting schedule trigger through Claude AI to a final report. Key learning: data quality gates and real evidence matter more than any individual tool choice.
